videos.title: Mono-Black Devotion, but Morlun Makes it Good | Much Abrew
videos.description:
Did Gray Merchant of Asphodel just get its new best friend in Morlun, Devourer of Spiders (probably better know as Luis, Pompus Pillager)? Let's find out!

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/much-abrew-devoted-to-louie-pioneer
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7360890#paper

videos.title: Iron Spider/Fizik is The New Steel Overseer
videos.description:
Steel Overseer was great for Affinity of old but thanks to Iron Spider / Fizik, we may have a new piece for artifact aggro decks!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-iron-spider-fizik-is-the-new-steel-overseer
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7360243#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/roOpW
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/yD8YP
